title: 15D/12N The Best of Balkans with Eastern Europe Experience 2026
details: Experience the best of Eastern Europe and the Balkans as you explore Hungary, Bosnia & Herzegovina, Croatia, Montenegro, Slovenia, and Austria. Visit UNESCO World Heritage Sites, Game of Thrones filming locations, historic cities, scenic lakes, and iconic landmarks including Budapest, Plitvice Lakes, Dubrovnik, Medjugorje, Lake Bled, and Vienna.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 3 for Emirates Airlines check-in. Enjoy in-flight meals and amenities. Flight: EK335 MNL–DXB 23:55–04:45 / EK111 DXB–BUD 10:30–14:20.
Arrival in Budapest. Meet your Tour Director and transfer to hotel. Dinner and overnight.
Explore Buda and Pest. Visit Buda Castle, Savoy Terrace, Matthias Church, Fisherman’s Bastion, St. Stephen’s Basilica, and enjoy a scenic Danube River Cruise.
City tour of Zagreb including Dolac Bazaar, St. Mark’s Church, Stone Gate, Ban Josip Jelacic Square, Lotrščak Tower, and Mirogoj Cemetery.
Visit Plitvice Lakes National Park with boat ride. Continue to Split for overnight.
Visit UNESCO-listed Trogir Old Town and Cathedral. Continue Split city tour including Diocletian’s Palace, Peristyle, Jupiter’s Temple, and Cathedral.
Visit Apparition Hill and St. James Church. Free time for devotion and meditation.
Explore Mostar Old Bridge and Turkish Quarter. Continue to Sarajevo for city tour.
Walking tour of Dubrovnik Old Town. Visit Franciscan Monastery, historic pharmacy, and Game of Thrones filming locations.
Visit Bay of Kotor, Kotor Old Town, St. Triphun Cathedral, Budva Old Town and Amphitheater.
Visit Sibenik Cathedral and Zadar Sea Organ. Transfer to hotel.
Explore Postojna Cave by electric train. Continue to Ljubljana city tour.
Pletna Boat Ride to Lake Bled island. Visit Church of Assumption. Drive to Vienna.

itinerary.day_title: Day 14: Vienna City Tour – Parndorf Outlet (Breakfast)
itinerary.day_details: Vienna city tour and shopping at Parndorf Designer Outlet. Transfer to airport.
Flight home via Emirates Airlines. EK126 VIE–DXB 22:40–06:15 / EK334 DXB–MNL 09:35–22:10. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Roundtrip economy airfare via Emirates Airlines
12 nights hotel accommodation (local 4-star category, twin sharing)
Tours and sightseeing as per itinerary
extra_details: Full payment required 45 days before departure
Child rate (0–5 years old): $2,250; 6 years old and above same as adult
Subject to force majeure and government restrictions
flight_details: Emirates Airlines – EK335 MNL–DXB 23:55–04:45 / EK111 DXB–BUD 10:30–14:20 / EK126 VIE–DXB 22:40–06:15 / EK334 DXB–MNL 09:35–22:10
